title: Classmate
titleNative: 클래스메이트
synonyms: 危险的同学
synopsis: "I'll be your friend." A chilling ghost boy, Hae-Su Lee, visits the outcast, Eun-Ha Ju. The moment she accepts this dangerous friendship, unexpected events unfold around Eun-Ha... Will this hand offered by her mysterious friend be salvation, or a curse? (Source: Naver, translated)

title: Namaiki Asahi-chan wo Wakarasetai
titleNative: ナマイキ旭ちゃんをわからせたい
synonyms: I Wanna Set This Cocky Asahi-chan Straight
synopsis: Ryou is in his last year of high school, and he's enjoying his otaku life to the fullest — except for a certain girl who's really getting on his nerves. She goes to his school and she's none other than his cocky two-year younger childhood-friend, Asahi-chan! Though she's suppose to be his kouhai, she's always teasing him whenever she gets the chance! On the other hand, if she gets teased back, she starts acting like "you can't say anything mean to me because I'm a cute girl." Furthermore, she's "afraid of people with practically no friends who can't be honest with their feelings." Someday, somehow, someone has to set this cocky Asahi-chan straight! (Source: Pocket Magazine, translated)

title: Vigilante 2
titleNative: 비질란테 2부
synonyms: Vigilante II
synopsis: After graduating from the Korean National Police University and becoming a detective, Ji-Yong is assigned to investigate a suspicious report and comes face-to-face with a nationwide jeonse scam. As he confronts criminals who slip through the cracks of the legal system without proper punishment, Ji-Yong begins to question the rules of vigilante justice he once set for himself. While pursuing the scam’s ringleaders, the four vigilantes receive a threat from someone who knows their true identities and begin to sense the looming presence of a far greater evil. (Source: WEBTOON)

title: Dragon Ball: That Time I Got Reincarnated as Yamcha!
titleEnglish: Dragon Ball: That Time I Got Reincarnated as Yamcha!
titleRomaji: Dragon Ball Gaiden: Tensei-shitara Yamcha Datta Ken
titleNative: ドラゴンボール外伝　転生したらヤムチャだった件
synopsis: A Japanese high school student is on his way to a Dragon Ball event with a friend. Suddenly, he sees a cute girl wearing a short skirt, but when he runs over to get a closer look, he trips and gets knocked out. Upon waking up, he realizes he's turned into Yamcha from Dragon Ball. Being an avid fan of the series, he knows what lies ahead in Yamcha's future, thus he decides to take matters into his own hands, in order to change Yamcha's fate. Note: Includes 2 extra chapters.

title: Houkago, Bokura wa Uchuu ni Madou
titleRomaji: Houkago, Bokura wa Uchuu ni Madou
titleNative: 放課後、僕らは宇宙に惑う
synonyms: After School, We Wander in Space.
synopsis: Kinoshima Rocketry Club casually uploaded a vlog of a test firing of their hybrid engine. The engine exploded — blowing away their dream of reaching space with it — but that wasn't the only thing that blew up in that video. Ayame Madoi, a girl who worked on the engine section who happened to appear in the vlog, also exploded in popularity when viewers from across the world found her cute. While she finds this attention bewildering, she actually already has someone she wishes would notice her that way… (Source: Shogakukan, translated)

title: Mimi's Tales of Terror
titleNative: ミミの怪談
synonyms: Mimi's Ghost Stories
Contos de Horror da Mimi
Les cauchemars de Mimi
Las historias de fantasmas de Mimi
synopsis: University student Mimi and her boyfriend Naoto encounter one chilling mystery after another. There’s the enigmatic neighbor woman dressed in black from head to toe—but if she’s so odd, why does it seems like there are many others like her? Then, whose eyes track Mimi’s movements from the cemetery next door? And why does a bizarre red circle drawn on a basement wall change with each passing day? Nine scary stories that really happened, drawn from the famed collection of urban legends Shin Mimibukuro (New Earmuffs), and adapted into manga by horror genius Junji Ito! Chapter 1: On the Utility Pole Chapter 2: The Woman Next Door Chapter 3: Rustling in the Grass Chapter 4: Grave Placement Chapter 5: Seashore Chapter 6: Just the Two of Us Chapter 7: Scarlet Circle Chapter 8: Sign in the Field Chapter 9: Monster Prop (Source: VIZ Media)

title: Peddler in Another World: I Can Go Back to My World Whenever I Want
titleRomaji: Itsudemo Jitaku ni Kaerareru Ore wa, Isekai de Gyoushounin wo Hajimemashita
titleEnglish: Peddler in Another World: I Can Go Back to My World Whenever I Want
titleNative: いつでも自宅に帰れる俺は、異世界で行商人をはじめました
synopsis: After quitting his job at a toxic company, Shiro Amata moves into the house his grandmother left him in her will. There, he soon makes two life-changing discoveries: one, his grandmother was really a witch from another world, and two, said other world is just on the other side of her closet door! Thanks to a book she left for Shiro, he also manages to obtain an all-powerful skill called “Equivalent Exchange,” which allows him to turn money from his world into otherworldly currency and vice versa. With this, Shiro decides to set up shop and sell convenient items like matches to the colorful inhabitants of the other world. His plan: make a massive profit on the goods he brings from home to become so rich that he never needs another job ever again! Based on the light novel of the same name. (Source: j-novel club)

title: Imouto wa Shitteiru
titleNative: 妹は知っている
synonyms: My sister knows
synopsis: At work, Kiichiro Miki is an ordinary salaryman who is considered expressionless and dull by his co-workers. He floats around at drinking parties and doesn't seem to be having any fun at all. But only I, his younger sister, knows the truth about him. My brother is actually “the most interesting man in the world." (Source: Kodansha, translated)

titleRomaji: Isshou Hatarakitakunai Ore ga, Classmate no Daininki Idol ni Natsukaretara
titleNative: 一生働きたくない俺が、クラスメイトの大人気アイドルに懐かれたら
synonyms: Verhätschel mich, Idol! – Werde zu meinem Groupie
synopsis: Rintaro Shido, a high school boy who aspires to become a full-time house-husband, is in the same class with Rei Otosaki, a popular and well-known idol. The two have no relationship other than being classmates, but that changes drastically when Rintaro serves Rei a home-cooked meal after she nearly collapses from hunger! The food was so delicious that Rei asks him, "Can I come and eat with you every day?" (Source: Comic Gardo, translated)

title: Sensei, Kongetsu Dou desu ka
titleNative: 先生、今月どうですか
synonyms: 老師, 這個月可以嗎
老師，這個月狀況如何?
synopsis: Murasaki has the power to see the future of the person she touches. As the landlord's daughter, she has to chase after Shijima Banri for rent every month. Every time, the poor author Shijima promises her that he'll pay rent as soon as he gets published and gets paid. Murasaki quietly supports his work, because she can see that Shijima is the person she is fated to marry. Note: Chapter count includes three extra chapters.

title: JUMBO MAX: Hyper ED Yakumitsuzounin
titleNative: JUMBO MAX ～ハイパーED薬密造人～
synonyms: ジャンボマックス ～ハイパーED薬密造人～
synopsis: Tateo Sone runs a pharmacy in Odawara and leads an ordinary but happy life with his beautiful wife and daughter-in-law. One day, however, when his wife tells him she is pregnant, he is shocked. It's because he has a secret: he has never had a functioning lower half of his body. His wife's child is not his own...Tateo despairs at the thought. At that time, a man named Sumaoka happens to give him a mysterious ED drug. Tateo impulsively takes the drug and is shocked to find that the function of his lower body miraculously recovers. Tateo declares to Sumaoka that he will recreate and make this medicine himself. But this is the beginning of a dangerous day that will change his life forever! (Source: Big Comic, translated)

title: Gakuen no Madonna no Watanabe-san ga, Naze ka Maishuu Yotei wo Kiitekuru @COMIC
titleRomaji: Gakuen no Madonna no Watanabe-san ga, Naze ka Maishuu Yotei wo Kiitekuru @COMIC
titleNative: 学園のマドンナの渡辺さんが、なぜか毎週予定を聞いてくる@COMIC
synopsis: Ryoichi Aikawa, an ordinary high school boy who’s crazy about fishing, helps the school’s Madonna, Misa Watanabe, when she’s being bothered by guys trying to pick her up by the seaside. After that, for some reason, Watanabe starts asking about his weekend plans every week and ends up making plans with him. Secretly meeting every weekend, the two slowly at an incredibly slow pace begin to close the distance between them…? A frustratingly sweet seaside romantic comedy featuring a single-minded, love-offensive JK and an unbelievably dense, iron-wall boy!
